hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.env$ ]]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️ .env contains secrets — use .env.example instead", "continue": false}'; exit 1; fi; exit 0

CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [[ "$CMD" =~ --step\ (caption|embed) ]] && ! [[ "$CMD" =~ --limit ]]; then echo '{"systemMessage": "⚠️  Indexer running without --limit. This will hit all photos and cost money. Use --limit to test first.", "continue": true}'; fi; exit 0

FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty'); if [[ "$FILE" =~ /app/ ]] || [[ "$FILE" =~ ^app/ ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run pytest --no-header -q 2>/dev/null || true; fi; exit 0
